ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resale_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resale transaction */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month and year of the resale transaction */,
  "town_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the town where the flat is located */,
  "flat_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of flat */,
  "block" INTEGER /* Block number of the flat */,
  "street_name_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the street name where the flat is located */,
  "storey_range_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the storey range of the flat */,
  "floor_area_sqm" REAL /* Floor area of the flat in square meters */,
  "flat_model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flat model */,
  "lease_commence_date" INTEGER /* Year the lease commenced */,
  "resale_price" INTEGER /* Resale price of the flat */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the flat */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the flat */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the resale transaction was completed */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the real estate agent who handled the transaction */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the seller of the flat */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the buyer of the flat */,
  "maintenance_fee" INTEGER /* Monthly maintenance fee for the flat */,
  "parking_slot" INTEGER /* Indicates if the flat comes with a parking slot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resale_transactions_town_id FOREIGN KEY ("town_id") REFERENCES towns ("town_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resale_transactions_flat_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("flat_type_id") REFERENCES flat_types ("flat_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resale_transactions_flat_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("flat_model_id") REFERENCES flat_models ("flat_model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resale_transactions_storey_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("storey_range_id") REFERENCES storey_ranges ("storey_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resale_transactions_street_name_id FOREIGN KEY ("street_name_id") REFERENCES street_names ("street_name_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "towns" (
  "town_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each town */,
  "town_name" TEXT /* Name of the town */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the town (e.g., North, South, East, West) */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the town */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the town */,
  "public_transport_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of public transport in the town */,
  "amenities_score" REAL /* Score indicating the availability of amenities in the town */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("town_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flat_types" (
  "flat_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flat type */,
  "flat_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the flat type (e.g., 1 ROOM, 2 ROOM, 3 ROOM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flat type */,
  "min_floor_area" REAL /* Minimum floor area for the flat type */,
  "max_floor_area" REAL /* Maximum floor area for the flat type */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the flat type */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the flat type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flat_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "street_names" (
  "street_name_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each street name */,
  "street_name" TEXT /* Name of the street */,
  "town_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the town where the street is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the street */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographical latitude of the street */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographical longitude of the street */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("street_name_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_street_names_town_id FOREIGN KEY ("town_id") REFERENCES towns ("town_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storey_ranges" (
  "storey_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storey range */,
  "storey_range_name" TEXT /* Name of the storey range (e.g., 01 TO 03, 04 TO 06) */,
  "min_storey" INTEGER /* Minimum storey number for the range */,
  "max_storey" INTEGER /* Maximum storey number for the range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("storey_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flat_models" (
  "flat_model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flat model */,
  "flat_model_name" TEXT /* Name of the flat model (e.g., IMPROVED, NEW GENERATION) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the flat model */,
  "bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the flat model */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the flat model */,
  "building_height" REAL /* Height of the building in meters */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the flat model was built */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flat_model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, real estate agent, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the user joined the platform */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resale transaction being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the transaction */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES resale_transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price trend */,
  "town_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the town */,
  "flat_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the flat type */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month and year of the trend */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average resale price */,
  "median_price" REAL /* Median resale price */,
  "min_price" INTEGER /* Minimum resale price */,
  "max_price" INTEGER /* Maximum resale price */,
  "transaction_count" INTEGER /* Number of transactions in the trend */,
  "standard_deviation_price" REAL /* Standard deviation of the resale prices */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_trends_flat_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("flat_type_id") REFERENCES flat_types ("flat_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_trends_town_id FOREIGN KEY ("town_id") REFERENCES towns ("town_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
